title: STAM PR Audit Log Entry
description: One line in stam/ops/pr-audit-log.jsonl — records PR change scope, verification, failure, correction, and final approval status.

type.description: PR category: UI, UI_COMMON_COMPONENT, CRUD_DB_API, DOCS_INFRA, FAILURE_CORRECTION, etc.

status.description: GitHub PR state at record time: open, closed, merged

baseSha.description: Base commit SHA when the PR was opened or last rebased

headSha.description: Head commit SHA of the PR branch

mergeSha.description: Commit SHA on main after merge, or null if not merged

changedFiles.description: List of file paths changed in the PR

allowedFiles.description: Optional allow-list of paths permitted for this PR

forbiddenTouched.description: True if any forbidden path appeared in the diff

visualPass.description: Overall visual verification pass, or null if not run

failureReason.description: Reason for failure or need for correction PR

correctionPr.description: Follow-up PR number that corrects this entry, if any

stagingUrl.description: Staging URL used for verification, if any

finalStatus.description: Final audit outcome: MERGED_PASS, MERGED_NEEDS_CORRECTION, CLOSED, OPEN, etc.

recordedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this log line was written
